calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Sep-22-2009 Failure To Post Jury Fees

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on as assigned by the Master Calendar Dept. 206 for Settlement on the Record this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. William Gargano, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lois Jones.
Elizabeth MacDonald, Esq. special appearance for Plaintiff: Chase Bank USA, N.A., a corp.
Plaintiff's Witness: Sheri Gorman is also present in court.
Defendant Jonathan D. Newman present in pro per.
Case settled, terms read into the record as follows:
Plaintiff shall have a judgment against the Defendant in the amount of principal $17,966.35, Interest $3,027.21, Attorney fee $2,125.00, Costs $351.00 for a total of $23,469.56
Defendant will make a one time payment of $3,500.00 on Oct. 15, 2009 and $500.00 payment on the 15th of each month for the next 5 months, with a balance of about $4,000.00 on April 15, 2009, and Plaintiff will filed for a satisfaction of the judgment with the court.
No enforcement of the judgment as long as defendant makes the payments as agreed to.
Parties agreed to terms in open court.
Ms. MacDonald will reduce the agreement to writing and no later then Oct. 15, 2009 to submit a Judgment to Dept. 218 for signature.

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Aug-28-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CHASE BANK USA, N.A., MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion for summary judgment - denied. Failure to shift burden. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/REQ)Judge: Ronald Evans Quidachay, Court Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
